CustomField.description: Checks for the type of message by the subject.
CustomField.formula: IF( CONTAINS( Subject , "Message Opened") , "Message Opened", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Message Sent") , "Message Sent", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Message Reply") , "Message Reply", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Bounce Received") , "Bounce Received", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Message reply") , "Message Reply", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Bounce received") , "Bounce Received", IF( CONTAINS( Subject , "Message opened") , "Message Opened", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Message sent") , "Message Sent", IF(CONTAINS( Subject , "Reply:") , "Message Reply", "Other")))))))))
CustomField.label: Message Status
